compiled_state.description:
# S3 — Install gerrit-to-platform in the Gerrit container

Part of epic 1fa8 (CI as a second Gerrit gate vote via gerrit-to-platform → GitHub Actions).

## Why
`gerrit-to-platform` (g2p) is the bridge that `workflow_dispatch`es the GitHub Actions CI on
`patchset-created` / `comment-added` and is the production-proven Gerrit→GitHub-Actions pattern.
The Gerrit `hooks` plugin execs `$site/hooks/*` **from inside the container**, so g2p and its
Python interpreter MUST live in the container — a host-side g2p (hooks symlinked into a
bind-mount) is broken because the container process cannot resolve a host interpreter path.

## What
Extend the Gerrit image with Python ≥3.11 + g2p; enable the `hooks` + `replication` Gerrit
**core** plugins (bundled in `gerrit.war`; no external download/sha256 — unlike the non-core
`events-log`/`oauth`); establish the hook symlinks at container start; configure g2p. Record the
g2p adoption + in-container runtime decision as an ADR.

## Scope
- Extend the Gerrit image (`FROM gerritcodereview/gerrit:3.14.1`) — a Dockerfile under
  `infra/compose/` — with Python ≥3.11 + `pip install gerrit-to-platform`.
- Enable core plugins (`infra/gerrit/plugins/README.md`); container-start hook-symlink step;
  `gerrit_to_platform.ini` + `replication.config` symlink + `recheck → verify` mapping.
- New ADR. Depends on S2 (replication) + S4 (the PAT via the container-env secret path).
- Out of scope: the workflow (S5), credential provisioning internals (S4), the gate (S1).

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Extend the Gerrit image (`FROM gerritcodereview/gerrit:3.14.1`) with Python ≥3.11 +
      `pip install gerrit-to-platform`, so the in-container hook exec resolves its interpreter
      (host-side placement is rejected — the `hooks` plugin execs `$site/hooks/*` in the container).
- [ ] Enable the `hooks` + `replication` **core** plugins (from `gerrit.war` via `init
      --install-plugin` / copy — no download or sha256 pin) and list them in
      `infra/gerrit/plugins/README.md`.
- [ ] At container start, symlink the `patchset-created` / `comment-added` / `change-merged`
      console-script hooks into the volume-mounted `$site/hooks/`, pointing at the in-container g2p
      paths (image-build-time symlinks are shadowed by the volume mount).
- [ ] Write `gerrit_to_platform.ini` (GitHub PAT sourced via the container-env path from S4 —
      `fetch-secrets.sh` → compose `.env`; no plaintext on disk) + the `replication.config` symlink
      + the `recheck → verify` mapping.
- [ ] Coexistence proof: push a test patchset and observe BOTH the review-bot webhook `LLM-Review`
      vote AND the g2p `workflow_dispatch` fire on the same event.
- [ ] Write an ADR recording **g2p adoption** as the Gerrit→GitHub-Actions bridge + the
      in-container runtime decision.

file_impact.reason: list enabled hooks + replication core plugins
enable hooks/replication core plugins from war
g2p config: PAT via host SSM, recheck mapping, replication.config symlink
ADR recording g2p adoption as the Gerrit->GitHub-Actions bridge
